title: triticum dicoccum var. ajar
intro: Triticum dicoccum var. ajar, also known as Emmer wheat, is an ancient variety of wheat that belongs to the family Poaceae and is considered a pseudo-cereal. Emmer wheat has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, where its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties due to its high content of polyphenols and other compounds. The health benefits of Emmer wheat include lowering cholesterol levels, reducing the risk of heart disease, and aiding in digestion. Emmer wheat can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in culinary dishes, such as bread and pasta.
